endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections
endpoints.description: Retrieves all the ExpressRouteCrossConnections in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections
endpoints.description: Retrieves all the ExpressRouteCrossConnections in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Gets details about the specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Updates an express route cross connection tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings
endpoints.description: Gets all peerings in a specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified peering for the ExpressRouteCrossConnection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a peering in the specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified peering from the ExpressRouteCrossConnection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}/arpTables/{devicePath}
endpoints.description: Gets the currently advertised ARP table associated with the express route cross connection in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{DEVICEPATH}} with a real devicepath.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}/routeTables/{devicePath}
endpoints.description: Gets the currently advertised routes table associated with the express route cross connection in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{DEVICEPATH}} with a real devicepath.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteCrossConnections/{crossConnectionName}/peerings/{peeringName}/routeTablesSummary/{devicePath}
endpoints.description: Gets the route table summary associated with the express route cross connection in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PEERINGNAME}} with a real peeringname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{CROSSCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real crossconnectionname. Replace {{DEVICEPATH}} with a real devicepath.
